  "findings": [
    "Inadequate bracing/kickers for anticipated pour pressure",
    "Potential for formwork blowout or collapse during concrete placement"
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Stop all concrete placement immediately",
    "Evacuate personnel from the affected area",
    "Engage a qualified engineer to review and redesign bracing per ACI 347",
    "Install additional bracing/kickers as per approved shoring/bracing plan before resuming pour"
  ],
  "rationale": "Inadequate bracing under active pour conditions presents an imminent danger of catastrophic formwork failure, risking serious injury or death. ACI 347 requires formwork to safely withstand all anticipated loads, including lateral pour pressure.",
  "references": ["ACI 347-04 Guide to Formwork for Concrete", "ACI 347.2R-05 Guide for Shoring/Reshoring of Concrete Multistory Buildings"]
}
